WELCOME Top 4 and Event Coordinators 💙

syncsusyd Edited • 4 w INTRODUCING YOUR 2026–2027 SYNCS DEVS & REPS 🫡 Vincent, Hugo & Nikhil building systems 💻⚙️ Damien, Richard, Daniel, Robin & Anushka representing the cohort 🎤📣 The voices at the front, and the coding in the back 🎉 Please give a warm WELCOME to our Devs & Reps 💙

syncsusyd 16 h What if robots could see, think, and act in the real world just like humans? 🤖 Join us as Dr. William Zhi dives into Embodied AI where robots learn from humans and operate beyond controlled settings. 🧠 Learn how robots pick up skills from just a few demonstrations 🌍 Adapt to new, unpredictable environments ⚙️ And leverage foundation models to improve perception 📅 26 March (Week 5) ⏰ 6–8PM 📍 Boardroom 124, J12 (CSB) 🍕 PEP hours + free food included Perfect for anyone interested in AI, robotics, or the future of intelligent systems. #SYNCS #USYD #EmbodiedAI #Robotics

1. Be a member of both SUAMS & SYNCS (it’s free!) 2. Follow both our Instagram accounts @usydsuams @syncsusyd 3. Tag a friend in the comments That’s it. Free memberships, free entry, and you could walk away with an AirPods 4, Air Fryer or a $100 Cole’s Gift Card 🙈 What are you waiting for !?? 🔗 Links in bio to sign up to both socs. ⏰ Giveaway closes 22nd March — tag someone NOW and get them in on it.

syncsusyd 2 d Are you CURIOUS about our weekly events 👀 (we know you are)… Join us every WEDNESDAY & THURSDAY for: 💻 Leetcoding Club 🎲 Social Nights 🌭 Weekly BBQ 🎤 Tech Talks Here at SYNCS, we have a great mix of tech, industry and social events for YOU (yes you) to enjoy! Please feel free to drop by any of our events each week, we would love to see you there! P.S. free food is provided 😮‍💨
syncsusyd Edited • 5 d Scoop & Toast 🍨🍞 is HERE! Come grab a sweet treat ✨, meet some new friends, and take a break between classes 💙 📍 J12 Front Lawn ⏰ Thursday 19 March, 11:00AM–12:00PM

syncsusyd Edited • 5 d Are you interested in getting more involved with SYNCS? Join us for our Semester 1 GM to hear about upcoming events, meet the team, and nominate yourself for leadership roles. Let your friends know and don’t miss YOUR chance this semester! 📅 Wed 25 March 📍 Boardroom 124, J12 CSB ⏰ 4:00PM-6:00PM 🚀 Open Roles - First Year Rep - Undergrad Rep - Postgrad Rep - International Rep - Diversity Rep Nominate yourself below: 👉 https://forms.gle/hFMSpE2K9KBP9QZ2A Check out the meeting agenda: 👉 https://docs.google.com/document/d/12JblNxMsai6-XLjSvvUeDkEYlCyHqRM6jkOvj3wZgt8/edit?usp=sharing

syncsusyd 6 d Another week, another STACK of SYNCS events 😮‍💨👏 Whether you’re: 🔗 battling LINKED LISTS 🥀 at Leetcoding Club 🍦 grabbing (free) ICE CREAM at Scoop & Toast 🧠 learning how to PITCH a conference talk 🤝 networking with industry at our 2026 ANNUAL INN …there’s something happening ALMOST EVERY DAY! Come say hi to our team and make some new friends at our events this week ✨

• Ideate conference talk topics • Structure and pitch your proposal • Understand how conference talks are selected Whether you’ve built something cool, researched a topic, or just want to share what you’re learning… this session will show you how to take the FIRST STEP into speaking. 📍 Boardroom 124 J12 (CSB) 🗓 Thursday 19 March 🕕 6–8pm 🍕 Free food + PEP hours
